mapper.select:
SELECT
NVL(A.SOC,'-') SOC, NVL(DECODE(A.SOC,'', '', NVL((SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = A.SOC AND ROWNUM = 1), A.SOC)),'-') SOC_NM,
'ALL' SOC_NM,
NVL(A.AGENT_ID,'-') AGENT_ID, NVL(FN_GET_ORGNM(A.AGENT_ID),'-') AGENT_NM,
NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'-') STATUS_DATE,
NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM'),'-') STATUS_DATE,
NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'A', 1, 0)),0) OPEN_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'S', 1, 0)),0) STOP_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', 1, 0)),0) CANCEL_CNT, COUNT(*) TOTAL_OPEN_CNT FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PAY_CL_CD = 'PP' AND B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE >= #{startDt} AND B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE <= #{endDt} AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
,A.SOC
,A.AGENT_ID
ORDER BY STATUS_DATE DESC

SELECT
NVL(A.SOC,'-') SOC, NVL(DECODE(A.SOC,'', '', NVL((SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = A.SOC AND ROWNUM = 1), A.SOC)),'-') SOC_NM,
'ALL' SOC_NM,
NVL(A.AGENT_ID,'-') AGENT_ID, NVL(FN_GET_ORGNM(A.AGENT_ID),'-') AGENT_NM,
NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'-') STATUS_DATE,
NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM'),'-') STATUS_DATE,
NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'A', 1, 0)),0) OPEN_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'S', 1, 0)),0) STOP_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', 1, 0)),0) CANCEL_CNT, COUNT(*) TOTAL_OPEN_CNT FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PAY_CL_CD = 'PP' AND B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE >= #{startDt} AND B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE <= #{endDt} AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
,A.SOC
,A.AGENT_ID
ORDER BY STATUS_DATE DESC

SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUB_LINK_NAME, B.AD_NATION, DECODE(B.AD_NATION, '', '미등록', F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'AD_NATION', B.AD_NATION)) AD_NATION_NM, B.SOC, (SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.SOC and rownum = 1) AS SERVICE_NM, B.FIRST_SOC, (SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.SOC and rownum = 1) AS FIRST_SERVICE_NM, B.SUB_STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', B.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM, TO_CHAR(B.ENTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')AS ENTER_DATE, TO_CHAR(B.STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD')AS STATUS_STOP_DT, TO_CHAR(B.STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD')AS STATUS_CANCEL_DT, TO_CHAR(B.BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BASIC_EXPIRE, B.MODEL_NAME, B.USE_TERM, TO_CHAR(B.LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD')AS LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, AGENT_ID, F_GET_AGENT_NM(B.AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM, NVL(B.AGENT_SALE_ID, '') AGENT_SALE_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(B.AGENT_SALE_ID) AGENT_SALE_NM, BASIC_REMAINS, TRY_RCG_CNT, TRY_RCG_CHARGE, RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, TOT_RCG_CNT, TOT_RCG_CHARGE, RCG_CARD_CHARGE, RCG_CMS_CHARGE, RCG_VAC_CHARGE, RCG_POS_CHARGE, RCG_ETC_CHARGE, USE_CNT, USE_DUR, USE_CHARGE, USE_PKT, VOC_N_DUR, VOC_N_CHARGE, VOC_I_DUR, VOC_I_CHARGE, TOT_VOC_DUR, TOT_VOC_CHARGE, VID_N_DUR, VID_N_CHARGE, VID_I_DUR, VID_I_CHARGE, TOT_VID_DUR, TOT_VID_CHARGE, SMS_N_CNT, SMS_N_CHARGE, SMS_I_CNT, SMS_I_CHARGE, TOT_SMS_CNT, TOT_SMS_CHARGE, PKT_N_DUR, PKT_N_CHARGE, PKT_I_DUR, PKT_I_CHARGE, TOT_PKT_DUR, TOT_PKT_CHARGE, DAY_CNT, DAY_CHARGE, ETC_CNT, ETC_DUR, ETC_PKT, ETC_CHARGE FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(C PPS_STATS_CDR_ENTER_DT_IDX)*/ CONTRACT_NUM, SUM(BASIC_REMAINS) BASIC_REMAINS, SUM(TRY_RCG_CNT) TRY_RCG_CNT, SUM(TRY_RCG_CHARGE) TRY_RCG_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_EDIT_CHARGE) RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_FREE_CHARGE) RCG_FREE_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_PAY_CHARGE) RCG_PAY_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE) RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE) RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, SUM(TOT_RCG_CNT) TOT_RCG_CNT, SUM(TOT_RCG_CHARGE) TOT_RCG_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_CARD_CHARGE) RCG_CARD_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_CMS_CHARGE) RCG_CMS_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_VAC_CHARGE) RCG_VAC_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_POS_CHARGE) RCG_POS_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_ETC_CHARGE) RCG_ETC_CHARGE, SUM(USE_CNT) USE_CNT, SUM(USE_DUR) USE_DUR, SUM(USE_CHARGE) USE_CHARGE, SUM(USE_PKT) USE_PKT, SUM(VOC_N_DUR) VOC_N_DUR, SUM(VOC_N_CHARGE) VOC_N_CHARGE, SUM(VOC_I_DUR) VOC_I_DUR, SUM(VOC_I_CHARGE) VOC_I_CHARGE, SUM((VOC_N_DUR+VOC_I_DUR)) AS TOT_VOC_DUR, SUM((VOC_N_CHARGE+VOC_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_VOC_CHARGE, SUM(VID_N_DUR) VID_N_DUR, SUM(VID_N_CHARGE) VID_N_CHARGE, SUM(VID_I_DUR) VID_I_DUR, SUM(VID_I_CHARGE) VID_I_CHARGE, SUM((VID_N_DUR+VID_I_DUR)) AS TOT_VID_DUR, SUM((VID_N_CHARGE+VID_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_VID_CHARGE, SUM(SMS_N_CNT) SMS_N_CNT, SUM(SMS_N_CHARGE) SMS_N_CHARGE, SUM(SMS_I_CNT) SMS_I_CNT, SUM(SMS_I_CHARGE) SMS_I_CHARGE, SUM((SMS_N_CNT+SMS_I_CNT)) AS TOT_SMS_CNT, SUM((SMS_N_CHARGE+SMS_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_SMS_CHARGE, SUM(PKT_N_DUR) PKT_N_DUR, SUM(PKT_N_CHARGE) PKT_N_CHARGE, SUM(PKT_I_DUR) PKT_I_DUR, SUM(PKT_I_CHARGE) PKT_I_CHARGE, SUM((PKT_N_DUR+PKT_I_DUR)) AS TOT_PKT_DUR, SUM((PKT_N_CHARGE+PKT_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_PKT_CHARGE, SUM(DAY_CNT) DAY_CNT, SUM(DAY_CHARGE) DAY_CHARGE, SUM(ETC_CNT) ETC_CNT, SUM(ETC_DUR) ETC_DUR, SUM(ETC_PKT) ETC_PKT, SUM(ETC_CHARGE) ETC_CHARGE FROM PPS_STATS_CDR C WHERE ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND ENTER_DATE < last_day(to_date(#{searchDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1 AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId} GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) A, (SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(D PPS_STATS_CDR_ENTER_DT_IDX)*/ CONTRACT_NUM, SUB_LINK_NAME, AD_NATION, SOC, SUB_STATUS, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, FIRST_SOC, BASIC_EXPIRE, MODEL_NAME, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, USE_TERM, NVL(AGENT_ID, '') AGENT_ID, NVL(AGENT_SALE_ID, '') AGENT_SALE_ID FROM PPS_STATS_CDR D WHERE STAT_MONTH = (SELECT MAX(STAT_MONTH) STAT_MONTH_MAX FROM PPS_STATS_CDR) AND ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND ENTER_DATE < last_day(to_date(#{searchDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1 AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
) B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM

SELECT NVL(B.CONTRACT_NUM, '-') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(B.SUB_LINK_NAME, '-') SUB_LINK_NAME, NVL(B.AD_NATION, '-') AD_NATION, NVL(DECODE(B.AD_NATION, '', '미등록', F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'AD_NATION', B.AD_NATION)), '-') AD_NATION_NM, NVL(B.SOC, '-') SOC, NVL((SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.SOC and rownum = 1), '-') AS SERVICE_NM, NVL(B.FIRST_SOC, '-') FIRST_SOC, NVL((SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.SOC and rownum = 1), '-') AS FIRST_SERVICE_NM, NVL(B.SUB_STATUS, '-') SUB_STATUS, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', B.SUB_STATUS), '-') AS SUB_STATUS_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.ENTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS ENTER_DATE, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS STATUS_STOP_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS STATUS_CANCEL_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS BASIC_EXPIRE, NVL(B.MODEL_NAME, '-') MODEL_NAME, NVL(B.USE_TERM, '0') USE_TERM, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, NVL(AGENT_ID, '-') AGENT_ID, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(B.AGENT_ID), '-') AGENT_NM, NVL(B.AGENT_SALE_ID, '-') AGENT_SALE_ID , NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(B.AGENT_SALE_ID), '-') AGENT_SALE_NM, BASIC_REMAINS, TRY_RCG_CNT, TRY_RCG_CHARGE, RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, TOT_RCG_CNT, TOT_RCG_CHARGE, RCG_CARD_CHARGE, RCG_CMS_CHARGE, RCG_VAC_CHARGE, RCG_POS_CHARGE, RCG_ETC_CHARGE, USE_CNT, USE_DUR, USE_CHARGE, USE_PKT, VOC_N_DUR, VOC_N_CHARGE, VOC_I_DUR, VOC_I_CHARGE, TOT_VOC_DUR, TOT_VOC_CHARGE, VID_N_DUR, VID_N_CHARGE, VID_I_DUR, VID_I_CHARGE, TOT_VID_DUR, TOT_VID_CHARGE, SMS_N_CNT, SMS_N_CHARGE, SMS_I_CNT, SMS_I_CHARGE, TOT_SMS_CNT, TOT_SMS_CHARGE, PKT_N_DUR, PKT_N_CHARGE, PKT_I_DUR, PKT_I_CHARGE, TOT_PKT_DUR, TOT_PKT_CHARGE, DAY_CNT, DAY_CHARGE, ETC_CNT, ETC_DUR, ETC_PKT, ETC_CHARGE FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(C PPS_STATS_CDR_ENTER_DT_IDX)*/ CONTRACT_NUM, SUM(BASIC_REMAINS) BASIC_REMAINS, SUM(TRY_RCG_CNT) TRY_RCG_CNT, SUM(TRY_RCG_CHARGE) TRY_RCG_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_EDIT_CHARGE) RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_FREE_CHARGE) RCG_FREE_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_PAY_CHARGE) RCG_PAY_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE) RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE) RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, SUM(TOT_RCG_CNT) TOT_RCG_CNT, SUM(TOT_RCG_CHARGE) TOT_RCG_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_CARD_CHARGE) RCG_CARD_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_CMS_CHARGE) RCG_CMS_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_VAC_CHARGE) RCG_VAC_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_POS_CHARGE) RCG_POS_CHARGE, SUM(RCG_ETC_CHARGE) RCG_ETC_CHARGE, SUM(USE_CNT) USE_CNT, SUM(USE_DUR) USE_DUR, SUM(USE_CHARGE) USE_CHARGE, SUM(USE_PKT) USE_PKT, SUM(VOC_N_DUR) VOC_N_DUR, SUM(VOC_N_CHARGE) VOC_N_CHARGE, SUM(VOC_I_DUR) VOC_I_DUR, SUM(VOC_I_CHARGE) VOC_I_CHARGE, SUM((VOC_N_DUR+VOC_I_DUR)) AS TOT_VOC_DUR, SUM((VOC_N_CHARGE+VOC_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_VOC_CHARGE, SUM(VID_N_DUR) VID_N_DUR, SUM(VID_N_CHARGE) VID_N_CHARGE, SUM(VID_I_DUR) VID_I_DUR, SUM(VID_I_CHARGE) VID_I_CHARGE, SUM((VID_N_DUR+VID_I_DUR)) AS TOT_VID_DUR, SUM((VID_N_CHARGE+VID_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_VID_CHARGE, SUM(SMS_N_CNT) SMS_N_CNT, SUM(SMS_N_CHARGE) SMS_N_CHARGE, SUM(SMS_I_CNT) SMS_I_CNT, SUM(SMS_I_CHARGE) SMS_I_CHARGE, SUM((SMS_N_CNT+SMS_I_CNT)) AS TOT_SMS_CNT, SUM((SMS_N_CHARGE+SMS_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_SMS_CHARGE, SUM(PKT_N_DUR) PKT_N_DUR, SUM(PKT_N_CHARGE) PKT_N_CHARGE, SUM(PKT_I_DUR) PKT_I_DUR, SUM(PKT_I_CHARGE) PKT_I_CHARGE, SUM((PKT_N_DUR+PKT_I_DUR)) AS TOT_PKT_DUR, SUM((PKT_N_CHARGE+PKT_I_CHARGE)) AS TOT_PKT_CHARGE, SUM(DAY_CNT) DAY_CNT, SUM(DAY_CHARGE) DAY_CHARGE, SUM(ETC_CNT) ETC_CNT, SUM(ETC_DUR) ETC_DUR, SUM(ETC_PKT) ETC_PKT, SUM(ETC_CHARGE) ETC_CHARGE FROM PPS_STATS_CDR C WHERE ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND ENTER_DATE < last_day(to_date(#{searchDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1 AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId} GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) A, (SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(D PPS_STATS_CDR_ENTER_DT_IDX)*/ CONTRACT_NUM, SUB_LINK_NAME, AD_NATION, SOC, SUB_STATUS, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, FIRST_SOC, BASIC_EXPIRE, MODEL_NAME, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, USE_TERM, NVL(AGENT_ID, '') AGENT_ID, NVL(AGENT_SALE_ID, '') AGENT_SALE_ID FROM PPS_STATS_CDR D WHERE STAT_MONTH = (SELECT MAX(STAT_MONTH) STAT_MONTH_MAX FROM PPS_STATS_CDR) AND ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND ENTER_DATE < last_day(to_date(#{searchDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1 AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId} ) B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
